page: Vultr vcg-a40-12c-60g-24vram is a Cloud GPU family server configured with an Intel x86_64 architecture. It features 12 physical cores and 12 vCPUs with a single thread per core, operating on a shared CPU allocation model. The system is equipped with 60.0 GB of system memory, providing 5.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server includes a fractional GPU allocation of 0.5 NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, which provides 24 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is bundled with the instance, consisting of a 1110 GB NVMe SSD. Additionally, the configuration includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

The fractional GPU allocation of 0.5 A40 allows for qualitative cost efficiency by enabling workloads to access enterprise-grade Ampere architecture without the expense of a full dedicated GPU. However, the shared CPU allocation represents a performance tradeoff, as CPU resources are shared with other tenants, which may introduce variability under sustained compute loads.

This server configuration is designed for workloads that require GPU acceleration and substantial local storage but do not demand dedicated CPU cores. Suitable applications include medium-scale machine learning inference, data analysis, graphics rendering, and database workloads that benefit from NVMe storage and GPU-accelerated processing.
description: Vultr vcg-a40-12c-60g-24vram is a Cloud GPU instance featuring 12 Intel x86_64 vCPUs on a shared allocation model with 12 physical cores and no hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 60.0 GB of system memory, yielding 5.0 GB per core. For acceleration, the server is equipped with a fractional 0.5 NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU providing 24 GB of VRAM. Storage is supported by a bundled 1110 GB NVMe SSD, and network connectivity includes one complimentary public IPv4 address. The fractional GPU design offers a cost-efficient entry point for GPU-accelerated workloads, though the shared CPU allocation introduces potential resource contention. The combination of high-capacity NVMe storage and a modern Ampere GPU makes it highly capable for data-intensive applications.

tagline: A shared-CPU cloud instance featuring a fractional NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU, 60 GB RAM, and high-speed NVMe SSD storage.

Fractional 0.5 NVIDIA Ampere A40 GPU with 24 GB VRAM
60.0 GB system memory (5.0 GB per core)

Suited for machine learning inference and GPU-accelerated data processing
